title: Trips
description: One trip the user is planning or has taken — the top-level container the concierge builds around.

title.description: short trip name shown in the list, e.g. 'Portugal, October'

brief.description: the user's original free-text description of what they want

status.description: 'planning' while the concierge builds it, 'booked', or 'complete'

budgetUsd.description: rough total budget the planner should respect

homeCurrency.description: the trip's base currency (ISO code) the finance roll-up normalizes mixed-currency expenses into, e.g. 'USD'/'EUR'

partySize.description: how many people are travelling; kept in sync with the travelers list and used for default expense splits

destinations.description: the places on this trip, in order

travelers.description: the party travelling on this trip
